title: I Can't recomend uploading videos via cell anymore

transcript.text: Hello, I'm making this video to say I'm sorry, but uploading videos via cell is not the way to go.

I got very excited and I thought it was the way to go, because it's easy, you just film yourself and then you push a button and it instantly uploads, but apparently that only works a couple of times and then it stops working and then you can't do it anymore and then you have to try like 20 times to it to finally work.

There's my phone rebooting. I have to reboot, reset my phone every time I upload a video and then I have to try to upload it like 10 or 15 times before it actually goes, so with this program called Kinoma Play, so I mean hopefully you have better luck than me.
I have an HTC fuse, but I'm not going to be able to recommend uploading videos via cell phone anymore. Too much of a pain in the ass.
I think the best way to do it is just with a regular video camera, with a SIM card, take the SIM card out, pop it in the computer, and then there you go.

While I'm on that subject, uploading videos via webcam, that does not work either, because the program that I was using, Premiere, crashes all the time and it takes forever, so best way to do it, video camera.
